nasb.text: I was in the Spirit on the Lord’s day, and I heard behind me a loud voice like the sound of a trumpet,

esv.text: I was in the Spirit on the Lord’s day, and I heard behind me a loud voice like a trumpet

cnv.text: 有一個主日，我在靈裡，聽見在我後邊有一個大聲音，好像號筒的響聲，

ccb.text: 主日，我被圣灵感动，听见身后有号角般响亮的声音说：

csbs.text: 有一个主日，我在灵里，听见我后面有一个大声音，如同号角声，
